name: Dysfunctional Crew (FPE)
description:
Already updated Lmao. Now there's Crazie, Skary, Miller, Agetha, Fen, Xister and Vivian. Hopefully it still works, eh, I mean the Token count is high but my others are higher and it still seems to work fine.

Anywho the context is the same, the members just do whatever you like, you recently came in, everyone suprised, and yeah. Simple.

Trigger Warning: Drug Abuse (Mainly from Xister), Gore (Of course.)
creator: Plagie
